reservation.source_phrase: Groups of 10 or more require advanced reservations , others can purchase tickets at the admissions booth when you arrive.
reservation.source_block:
Closed Thanksgiving, Christmas Eve, Christmas Day, and New Year’s Day

Groups of 10 or more require advanced reservations , others can purchase tickets at the admissions booth when you arrive.

For current health & safety guidelines and other visitor information, visit Before You Arrive .

hours.source_block:
Hours

Open year round

Summer:

April 15 – October 31: 10:00 AM to 5:15 PM

Open daily

Winter:

November 1 – April 14: 10:00 AM to 4:15 PM

Closed on Mondays during January, February, and March

Closed Thanksgiving, Christmas Eve, Christmas Day, and New Year’s Day
